name: Pepper Salad (Ensalada De Ajis Dulces)
recipeIngredient: 6 large Sweet red and green peppers (roasted)
1 small clove garlic (pressed through a garlic press)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place roasted pepper strips on serving dish.
2. Cover with onion slices, separated into rings.
3. Scatter olives over the salad.
4. In a blender, combine olive oil, vinegar, garlic, salt, sugar, and water.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad.
6. Cover with plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour, no more than 4 hours.
8. Serve chilled. Gently toss the salad before serving.
Note: To roast peppers, cut off the sides in four slabs. Arrange, skin side up, on a baking sheet lined with foil. Broil 6 inches from the heat until the skin is blackened. Wrap the foil lining and let cool enough to handle before slipping off the skin.
